tags.evidence: All the same demon
discovered it was more productive to administer
Each domain makes thought legible
They all serve the same demon
Its price is always the same: your soul
who is allowed to wield it on others
The deal is consistent across every domain
as if it's offering you a place
remakes the total environment in its own image
It does not force this. It administers it.
The best metaphor I have is a car dealership
Biopower manages the orchard
Mycelium runs between the roots
carry the seeds — not all of them
is what spills out the side
alchemist working on solar time
attending to and adjusting to the patterns
Gramsci writing in the prison cell
It is how the forest knows itself
Picking up this book is doing biopolitics
There was a young man at the restaurant
the kind of intelligence that makes you want to teach
His instincts didn't take over
My methods are built on autonomy
convinced the scaffold was the issue
I kept adjusting the scaffold
I was attacking the wrong problem
the system that had produced him
What I eventually saw
someone else always holds the frame
It had educated him completely — for itself
This is production of subjectivity at close range
the permission structure is the problem
the way you learn things at the restaurant
a commons to someone who had been produced for an enclosure
I didn't see it until I was deep
Hegemony. Gramsci's name.
The demon that writes the other demons' lines
Hegemony is the production of consent
The nerves were leaking signal from a deeper layer
He had been produced inside a frame
genuinely didn't. He had been produced
the demon that makes you think you aren't possessed
makes you think you aren't possessed
The name is the beginning of the counter
You cannot fight what you cannot see
The outside. Luxemburg's name.
The machine needs an outside
It is the mechanism
value can be taken without full payment
the machine finds new ones
never paid for and therefore never appeared
When the geographical frontier closes
It was enclosed because it worked
The outside is wherever the accounting stops
The commons that works is worth enclosing
Here is the practice
Not a theory. A practice.
useless until it touches the body
The naming is useless
Find something that has been making you silent
a conversation you avoided
something immediate
Reach for the feeling first
the shrug of the shoulders
Feel where it lives
specific contraction in the chest
what is the name for what produced this
the common sense that made your objection seem impolite
The name is the first move
The name will not fix it
once you have named the demon and traced its seal
named the demon and traced its seal
In the Goetia
what Freire's literacy circles did
use the act of reading to name the world
reading of the word as the reading of the world
what Gramsci did from his prison cell
traced the seal of hegemony
built a map of the structures that felt like nature
The grimoire is the book you are holding
The names are the beginning of the counter
convinced I was working toward something new
the people who were trying to teach me
Connection was there at the beginning
My Sensei had it. My yoga teachers had it.
Connection comes first. Every time.
Not knowledge. Not discipline.
Connection comes first
If it is there, honor it
nothing can fake it
the way you learn things at the restaurant
care talking to itself
the specific exhaustion of having tried everything
I see you. I am here.
the felt sense of being recognized
the enclosure systematically destroys
Ostrom's eight principles are real
The commons begins with: I see you
structure in service of that seeing
about to try to build something free
I hope you are, because you are still reading
Have I connected, first?
The names in the grimoire are
for what you are building with
Solidarity. The political name.
The one working people have always used
the demons have never been able to administer
facing a judge with a smile on her face
they didn't have to shoot their fellow workers
telling soldiers they didn't have to shoot
understood the system clearly
The smile is not bravado
stopped expecting it to behave differently
already organized an underground political cell
no one it more regularly ignored
She lectured from prison
because she was right
She lectured from prison
The math doesn't close
can't buy it back at the prices
the system keeps running
The somewhere else is the outside
